name: {NICKNAME}
desc: A {F#girl}{M#boy} who boarded the Astral Express.\n{F#She}{M#He} chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

1.name: Believe In the Light
1.desc: After using Skill, the next Ultimate increases the amount of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" gained by ally targets by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

2.name: History in the Making...
2.desc: Ultimate additionally increases the Elation of one designated ally by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Into the Spotlight
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Save the World. Just Because.
4.desc: When using Elation Skill, increases the DMG taken by enemy targets by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

5.name: Love & Courage: Always in Style
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: The Cosmic Legend Cometh!
6.desc: When using Elation Skill, increases this unit's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns.

801001.name: Make Some Noise
801001.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
801001.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

801002.name: Let the Storm Rage On
801002.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to all enemies and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "<u>Certified Banger</u>."
801002.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies and gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>."

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

801003.name: May the Trailblaze Fly You Starward
801003.desc: Gains <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> point(s). Increases the CRIT DMG of one designated ally by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s), and dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> on them.\nIf the target has Elation Skill, they additionally gain <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" and immediately use their Elation Skill 1 time, taking into account a fixed amount of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> point(s). If the enemy target is defeated before the Elation Skill is unleashed, then the Elation Skill is instead launched on a newly entering enemy target.\nIf the target does not have Elation Skill, their <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
801003.simple_desc: Gains <u>Punchline</u>. Increases the CRIT DMG of one designated ally, and dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> on that target. If the target has Elation Skill, the <color=#f29e38ff>target additionally gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>"</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>immediately uses their Elation Skill</color>. Otherwise, their <u>action advances</u>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

801004.name: That Smile Hits Different
801004.desc: After using an attack, regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> point(s).\nWhen the Trailblazer holds "<u>Certified Banger</u>," their Skill additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> Lightning <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies. This DMG is calculated using the highest "<u>Certified Banger</u>" value among all allies.
801004.simple_desc: After using an attack, regenerates Energy and gains <u>Punchline</u>.\nWhen the Trailblazer holds "<u>Certified Banger</u>," their Skill additionally deals minor Lightning <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

801006.name: Attack
801006.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.
801006.simple_desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

801007.name: We Are So Back!
801007.desc:
After using Technique, randomly gains 1 of the following effects:
A low chance to gain "Hearty Laughter": Increases Elation by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
A high chance to gain "Irrepressible Laughter": Increases Elation by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
When the next battle begins, increases all allies' Elation stat by the corresponding amount for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
801007.simple_desc: After using Technique, <color=#f29e38ff>increases all allies' Elation</color> when entering the next battle.

801020.name: I Said "Elation," Did I Stutter?
801020.desc: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instances of DMG, with each instance dealing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> Lightning <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy. At last, deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> Lightning <u>Elation DMG</u>, which is split evenly among all enemies.
801020.simple_desc: Deals multiple instances of DMG, with each instance dealing minor Lightning <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy. At last, deals Lightning <u>Elation DMG</u> that is split evenly among all enemies.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

1.point_desc: For every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Trailblazer's ATK that exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, increases this unit's Elation stat by <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum increase of <unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak>.
Increases this unit's CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After using Ultimate, recovers <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for the team.
After an ally target uses Elation Skill, Trailblazer additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" the next time they use their Skill.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.
